home.title: Command Center
home.updateAvailable: An update is available for KAMRAD!
home.easySetupDesc: Not sure where to start? Use the setup wizard to quickly configure your KAMRAD!
home.installAppsDesc: Not seeing your favorite app? Install it here!

maps.title: Maps
maps.baseAssetsNotInstalled: The base map assets have not been installed. Please download them first to enable map functionality.
maps.noRegionsDownloaded: No map regions have been downloaded yet. Please download some regions to enable map functionality.
maps.mapsManagerDesc: Manage your stored map files and explore new regions!
maps.confirmDeleteMsg: Are you sure you want to delete {{filename}}? This action cannot be undone.

easySetup.title: Easy Setup Wizard
easySetup.noInternetMsg: It looks like you're not connected to the internet. Installing apps and downloading content will require an internet connection.
easySetup.runningInBackgroundMsg: Feel free to leave this page at any time - your app installs and downloads will continue in the background! Please note, the Information Library (if installed) may be unavailable until all initial downloads complete.
easySetup.infoLibraryDesc: Offline access to Wikipedia, medical references, how-to guides, and encyclopedias
easySetup.infoLibraryFeature2: Medical references and first aid guides
easySetup.infoLibraryFeature3: DIY repair guides and how-to content
easySetup.educationPlatformDesc: Interactive learning platform with video courses and exercises
easySetup.educationFeature1: Khan Academy math and science courses
easySetup.aiAssistantDesc: Local AI chat that runs entirely on your hardware - no internet required
easySetup.aiFeature1: Private conversations that never leave your device
easySetup.aiFeature2: No internet connection needed after setup
easySetup.aiFeature3: Ask questions, get help with writing, brainstorm ideas
easySetup.aiFeature4: Runs on your own hardware with local AI models
easySetup.notesDesc: Simple note-taking app with local storage
easySetup.dataToolsDesc: Swiss Army knife for data encoding, encryption, and analysis

apps.title: App Settings
apps.heading: Apps
apps.description: Manage the applications that are available in your KAMRAD instance. Nightly update checks will automatically detect when new versions of these apps are available.
apps.installServiceMsg: Are you sure you want to install {{name}}? This will start the service and make it available in your KAMRAD instance. It may take some time to complete.
apps.forceReinstallMsg: Are you sure you want to force reinstall {{name}}? This will WIPE ALL DATA for this service and cannot be undone. You should only do this if the service is malfunctioning and other troubleshooting steps have failed.
apps.stopStartMsg: Are you sure you want to {{action}} {{name}}?
apps.restartServiceMsg: Are you sure you want to restart {{name}}?

legal.title: Legal Notices
legal.licenseText: Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0 (the "License"); you may not use this file except in compliance with the License.
legal.thirdPartyDesc: KAMRAD integrates the following open source projects:
legal.privacyDesc: KAMRAD is designed with privacy as a core principle:
legal.zeroTelemetry: Zero Telemetry: KAMRAD does not collect, transmit, or store any usage data, analytics, or telemetry.
legal.localFirst: Local-First: All your data, downloaded content, AI conversations, and notes remain on your device.
legal.noAccounts: No Accounts Required: KAMRAD operates without user accounts or authentication by default.
legal.networkOptional: Network Optional: An internet connection is only required to download content or updates. All installed features work fully offline.
legal.medicalNotSubstitute: This information is NOT a substitute for professional medical advice, diagnosis, or treatment.
legal.attribution: Based on Project N.O.M.A.D. by Crosstalk Solutions LLC

models.title: {{name}} Settings | KAMRAD
models.description: Easily manage the {{name}}'s settings and installed models. We recommend starting with smaller models first to see how they perform on your system before moving on to larger ones.
models.depsNotInstalled: {{name}}'s dependencies are not installed. Please install them to manage AI models.
models.gpuNotAccessibleMsg: Your system has an NVIDIA GPU, but {{name}} can't access it. AI is running on CPU only, which is significantly slower.
models.chatSuggestionsDesc: Display AI-generated conversation starters in the chat interface
models.assistantNameDesc: Give your AI assistant a custom name that will be used in the chat interface and other areas of the application.
models.deleteModelMsg: Are you sure you want to delete this model? You will need to download it again if you want to use it in the future.
models.reinstallAIMsg: This will recreate the {{name}} container with GPU support enabled. Your downloaded models will be preserved. The service will be briefly unavailable during reinstall.
models.modelDownloadStarted: Model download initiated for {{model}}. It may take some time to complete.
models.modelInstallError: There was an error installing the model: {{model}}. Please try again.
models.modelDeleteError: There was an error deleting the model: {{model}}. Please try again.
models.settingUpdateError: There was an error updating the setting. Please try again.

system.title: System Information
system.description: Real-time monitoring and diagnostics • Last updated: {{timestamp}} • Refreshing data every 30 seconds
system.highMemoryMsg: System memory usage exceeds 90%. Performance degradation may occur.
system.gpuNotAccessibleAI: GPU Not Accessible to AI Assistant

update.title: System Update
update.description: Keep your KAMRAD instance up to date with the latest features and improvements.
update.containerRestartingMsg: The admin container is restarting. This page will reload automatically when the update is complete.
update.connectionLostMsg: You may see error notifications while the backend restarts during the update. This is completely normal and expected. Connection should be restored momentarily.
update.newVersionAvailable: A new version ({{version}}) is available for your KAMRAD instance.
update.runningLatest: Your system is running the latest version!
update.pullImagesDesc: Downloads the newest Docker images for all core containers
update.recreateContainersDesc: Safely stops and recreates all core containers with the new images
update.autoReloadDesc: This page will automatically reload when the update is complete
update.backupReminderMsg: While updates are designed to be safe, it's always recommended to backup any critical data before proceeding.
update.temporaryDowntimeMsg: Services will be briefly unavailable during the update process. This typically takes 2-5 minutes depending on your internet connection.
update.earlyAccessDesc: Receive release candidate (RC) versions before they are officially released. Note: RC versions may contain bugs and are not recommended for environments where stability and data integrity are critical.
update.contentUpdatesDesc: Check if newer versions of your installed ZIM files and maps are available.
update.allContentUpToDateMsg: All your installed content is running the latest available version.

support.title: Support the Project
support.intro: KAMRAD is 100% free and open source — no subscriptions, no paywalls, no catch. If you'd like to help keep the project going, here are a few ways to show your support.
support.buyCoffeeDesc: Every contribution helps fund development, server costs, and new content packs for KAMRAD. Even a small donation goes a long way.
support.starOnGithubDesc: — it helps more people discover KAMRAD
support.shareProject: Share KAMRAD with someone who'd use it — word of mouth is the best marketing
support.joinDiscordDesc: — hang out, share your build, help other users

zim.title: Content Manager | KAMRAD
zim.heading: Content Manager
zim.kiwixNotInstalled: The Kiwix application is not installed. Please install it to view downloaded ZIM files

explorer.title: Content Explorer | KAMRAD
explorer.heading: Content Explorer
explorer.description: Browse and download content for offline reading!
explorer.noInternet: No internet connection. You may not be able to download files.
explorer.kiwixNotInstalled: The Kiwix application is not installed. Please install it to view downloaded content files.
explorer.confirmDownloadMsg: Are you sure you want to download {{title}}? It may take some time for it to be available depending on the file size and your internet connection. The Kiwix application will be restarted after the download is complete.
explorer.downloadError: An error occurred while starting downloads.

components.downloadUrlDesc: Enter the URL of the map region file you wish to download. The URL must be publicly reachable and end with .pmtiles. A preflight check will be run to verify the file's availability, type, and approximate size.
components.preflightPassed: Preflight check passed. Filename: {{filename}}, Size: {{size}} MB
components.dataPreserved: Your data and configuration will be preserved during the update.
components.downloadingWikipedia: Downloading Wikipedia... This may take a while for larger packages.
components.wikipediaFailed: Wikipedia download failed. Select a package and try again.
components.selectTierDesc: Select a tier based on your storage capacity and needs. Higher tiers include all content from lower tiers.
components.tierInfoNote: You can change your selection at any time. Click Submit to confirm your choice.
components.majorVersionWarning: It's not recommended to upgrade to a new major version (e.g. 1.8.2 → 2.0.0) unless you have verified compatibility with your current configuration. Always review the release notes and test in a staging environment if possible.
